publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-06-15 00:01:32 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Minutes, reports, statements, correspondence, speeches and other items.
did.abstract: Records of Dean David L. Call include materials pertaining to various departments of the college; other colleges at Cornell University; the Agricultural Experiment Station in Geneva, New York; the Cornell Board of Trustees and administration; Cornell Plantations; SUNY; CALS Alumni Association; Isles of Shoals; the Sea Grant Institute; Boyce Thompson Institute; New York State Department of Agriculture and Markets; New York State Council of Farmer Cooperatives; the Council of Agricultural Organizations; Agway, Inc., Agricultural Resources Commission; and the Environmental Protection Agency.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Dean, New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences (CALS), 1977-1995.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records of Dean David L. Call include materials pertaining to various departments of the college; other colleges at Cornell University; the Agricultural Experiment Station in Geneva, New York; the Cornell Board of Trustees and administration; Cornell Plantations; SUNY; CALS Alumni Association; Isles of Shoals; the Sea Grant Institute; Boyce Thompson Institute; New York State Department of Agriculture and Markets; New York State Council of Farmer Cooperatives; the Council of Agricultural Organizations; Agway, Inc., Agricultural Resources Commission; and the Environmental Protection Agency. Included are minutes, reports, statements, correspondence, speeches and other items concerning pesticide use and environmental issues, bovine hormone use, agricultural extension, rural development, pest control, migrant labor, agricultural policies, soil and water conservation, legislative bills, investments, land-grant affairs, academic funding and tuition, development, budgets, admissions, faculty salaries and tenure, staff relations, affirmative action and minority affairs, sex discrimination, education programs, libraries, computers, campus planning and development, university policies and procedures, and other matters. Major correspondents include Frank Rhodes, Henry Uihlein, and Roy Carver. Also photographs and items relating to his retirement. Also materials relating to the Unimal and a Chinese vase presented to Call by President Lee Teng-hui of Taiwan.

separatedmaterial.head: SEPARATED MATERIAL
separatedmaterial.p: Correspondence with George A. West regarding Theta Alpha fraternity, Cornell Beta Chapter, including a list of early members added to the Theta Alpha collection, #37-4-2196. Biographical information, articles, and a photograph added to faculty biographical file, #47-10-3394.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: David L. Call papers, #21-2-1620. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Boxes 1-67 restricted to the permission of the Dean's Office, New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes and list of Master Farmers in New York State from the Master Farmers of America.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes images of former Taiwan President Lee Teng-hui, Richard Lockwood, Mario Cuomo, Hank Dullea, William Parment, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Information regarding 1980 Cornell delegation trip to China and Call's letters home.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Marquis Who's Who, Cornell University Council, Liberty Hyde Bailey Leadership Society also a poem from Robert C. Woodbury.

did.unittitle: Your Evening At The Crown Jewel Of The College

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photo album of retirement event at the New York State Agricultural Experiment Station, Geneva.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Testimonials, letters, and other thanks and reminisces in recognition of Dean Call's retirement from his friends and colleagues.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Testimonials, letters, and other thanks and reminisces, in recognition of Dean Call's retirement from his friends and colleagues.

did.unittitle: Howard Babcock Unimal toy (wooden frame removed), Unimal coffee mug with Agway tag, and a Unimal advertisement
Chinese vase presented to Call by President Lee Teng-hui of Taiwan.
